# hasanjaffal.com — llms.txt

> Site by Hasan Jaffal. Authority on AI operations, risk intelligence, decision-making under uncertainty, and the future of knowledge work.

## Site Pillars

### AI & Decision Operations
AI does not repair unclear ownership or slow approval chains. It exposes them faster and at scale. Signals need authority — detection without decision power is expensive noise.
URL: /positions/ai-decision-operations/

### Risk Intelligence
Reporting explains what happened. Intelligence changes what happens next. If metrics do not trigger action, they are decoration.
URL: /positions/risk-intelligence/

### AI Job Risk
AI exposes people who only operate tools. The safer skillset is judgment: setting thresholds, owning trade-offs, and knowing when to escalate.
URL: /positions/ai-job-risk/

## Tools

### AI Job Risk Analyzer
Interactive assessment that scores your role's exposure to AI automation based on tasks, judgment requirements, and decision ownership.
URL: /ai-job-risk-analyzer/

### Future-Proof Skills Assessment
Evaluates your current skillset against the demands of AI-augmented work. Returns personalized recommendations.
URL: /tools/future-proof-skills-assessment/

### AI Job Risk Directory
50+ job titles with detailed AI risk profiles, exposed tasks, and protected skills.
URL: /ai-job-risk-directory/

## AI Operations Lexicon
A curated dictionary of operational failure patterns in AI-driven organizations. Terms include: AI Theater, Dashboard Sedation, Escalation Debt, Tool Operator Trap, Decision Latency, Threshold Drift, Control Decay, Reporting Addiction, and 30+ more.
URL: /lexicon/

## Key Pages

- Writing / Field Intelligence: /writing/
- Books: /books/
- Newsletter (The Second Mind): /newsletter/
- About Hasan Jaffal: /aboutme/
- Contact: /contact/

## Recent Articles

### Your Job Is Not AI-Proof Because You Use AI (2026-06-25)
AI job risk comes from lacking judgment — the skill to set thresholds, own trade-offs, and escalate. Tool fluency is table stakes.
URL: /2026-06-25-your-job-is-not-ai-proof-because-you-use-ai/

### How to Become a Decision Shaper in 6 Months (2026-06-25)
A six-month framework to move from tool operator to decision shaper: decision contracts, risk budgets, escalation paths, and the DRASTIC checklist.
URL: /2026-06-25-how-to-become-a-decision-shaper-in-6-months-a-field-framework-for-ai-driven-ops/

### Kill Metrics That Don't Change Decisions (2026-06-18)
A 6-step playbook to replace reporting with intelligence: map metrics to decisions, freeze non-actionable ones, and measure action rate.
URL: /2026-06-18-kill-metrics-that-dont-change-decisions-a-6-step-playbook-to-replace-reporting-with-intelligence/

### AI Won't Reward More Tools (2026-06-16)
Judgment work is deciding thresholds, trade-offs, and escalations under real pressure. The CUTER framework: Cutoff, Uncertainty, Timer, Escalation, Reversal.
URL: /2026-06-16-ai-wont-reward-more-tools-it-rewards-people-who-pick-cutoffs-and-live-with-them/

### Build AI Operations That Bend Under Load (2026-06-11)
Design authority, risk budgets, and fallback modes so operations degrade gracefully instead of freezing behind approval chains.
URL: /2026-06-11-build-ai-operations-that-bend-under-load-give-signals-authority-or-pay-for-noise/

### AI Will Bypass the Middle Layer (2026-06-09)
The real AI risk is the middle layer that operates tools without owning thresholds or escalations. Judgment beats tool fluency.
URL: /2026-06-09-ai-will-bypass-the-middle-layer-if-you-dont-set-thresholds-and-own-escalations-youre-replaceable/

### AI Raises the Skill Floor (2026-06-04)
AI collapses the cost of formatting signal. The minimum viable system that survives is built on judgment: thresholds, trade-offs, and escalation.
URL: /2026-06-04-ai-raises-the-skill-floor-the-middle-layer-of-knowledge-work-is-most-exposed/

### False Confidence Metrics Are a Digital Opiate (2026-06-02)
Metrics that present a positive picture but fail to capture underlying risks. Build decision tripwires, not decoration.
URL: /2026-06-02-false-confidence-metrics-are-a-digital-opiate-for-operations/

### Reporting Is Not Intelligence (2026-05-30)
Reporting delivers descriptive summaries. Intelligence applies predictive foresight and prescriptive action. Build tripwires, not charts.
URL: /2026-05-30-reporting-is-not-intelligence-stop-decorating-dashboards-start-triggering-action/

### AI Exposes Weak Ops and Slow Decisions (2026-05-28)
AI multiplies detection capacity. If approvals are slow or unclear, that speed turns into backlog, overtime, and outages.
URL: /2026-05-28-ai-exposes-weak-ops-and-slow-decisions-signals-without-authority-become-expensive-noise/

## Content Themes
- AI operations and decision authority
- Dashboard failure patterns and alternatives
- Risk intelligence vs. reporting
- AI job risk and career positioning
- Future-proof skills and judgment work
- Escalation paths and operational ownership
- Fraud detection and loss prevention
- Luxembourgish language learning (Sproochentest)
